domain_text: Forecast the outcome of RESOLVED Polymarket prediction markets. Each problem gives a real prediction-market question (and optionally a short description / close date) for a market that has ALREADY resolved, and the model must predict the binary outcome as YES or NO. The reference/ground-truth is the actual resolution. Verifier: extract a YES/NO answer from the completion (prefer a '#### YES' or '#### NO' marker, else detect the words yes/no) and do a normalized exact string match against the resolved outcome - fully programmatic, no LLM judgement. DATA SOURCE: prefer fetching resolved markets + resolutions from the Polymarket public Gamma API (https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/markets?closed=true) and CACHE them to a local JSON file under the domain folder on first run; BUT you MUST also ship a baked-in fallback set of at least 24 real, well-known resolved markets with correct YES/NO outcomes (major elections, sports finals, crypto milestones) so the pack works with no network, exactly like the gsm8k offline fallback. Make train and eval splits disjoint.
name: Polymarket resolved forecasts
description: Forecast the binary outcome of resolved Polymarket prediction markets. Each problem is a real closed market question (with optional description and close date); the model must predict YES or NO as it would have before resolution. Ground truth is the actual market resolution.
source_detail: Polymarket Gamma API (https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/markets?closed=true) for resolved binary Yes/No markets, cached to domains/polymarket/resolved_markets.json on first fetch; 28 baked-in offline fallback markets (2020 election, crypto milestones, Super Bowl, Oscars, UFC) when offline.
answer_format: Final forecast on its own line as '#### YES' or '#### NO'.
verifier_description: Programmatic normalized exact-match: extract YES/NO from the completion (prefer the '#### YES'/'#### NO' marker, else the last standalone yes/no token), uppercase, and compare to the resolved outcome string. No LLM judgement.

sample_problems.prompt: Will Trump win the 2020 U.S. presidential election?
Will Joe Biden be inaugurated as President of the USA on January 20th, 2021?
